---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for MapClone
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you're suggesting.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature address?
(e.g. "I'm frustrated when I can't do X because...")

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this could work?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered?

## Mockups / Examples
If you have sketches, screenshots, or examples from other apps, add them here.

## Additional Context
Anything else that might help us understand the request.
